Be careful with sharp comments, secrecy, or pride during conflict, because rigidity when respect feels missing can combine with burning energy faster than it refills and make a temporary mood look like a permanent character flaw. The best fame strategy is disciplined consistency: show receipts, honor collaborators, and refine one public lane until the market can identify your color without explanation. Trust suits you better than spotlight. Recognition follows when quality becomes repeatable.

ko.dayMasterDeep: 당신은 사람들이 자연스럽게 따라오는 리더형이에요. 환한 열정이 안에서 자라고 있지만, 다 보여주지 않는 면이 있어 더 매력적으로 보입니다. 약속에는 엄격하지만 그 기준이 당신에게도 똑같이 적용돼 자기를 몰아가요. 큰나무가 한여름 불을 먹여 비전이 무대성과 대중성으로 번지는 경향이 있어서 그래서 마음이 단순하게 움직이기보다, 여러 생각을 한 번 더 거치는 편이에요. 주변에서 가장 응원하던 사람이 잠시 멀어집니다. 일시적입니다. 원칙, 성장, 보호 본능에 인기, 속도, 표현력이 붙어 무대 뒤 계산과 무대 위 존재감이 함께 살아요. 무대 위 안정감은 안쪽의 수많은 반복에서 비롯돼요. 다만 열정이 과하면 체력과 관계가 함께 소모돼요. 한 가지 결정을 끝까지 책임지면 다음 문이 열립니다.
ko.career: 일과 진로는 원칙, 성장, 보호 본능을 인기, 속도, 표현력으로 증명할 때 열려요. 단순히 반복되는 일보다 본인 색깔과 결과가 잘 드러나는 일이 잘 맞아요. 예상치 못한 사람에게서 인정받는 분위기가 한 번은 와요. 기획, 콘텐츠, 기술, 교육, 돈 다루기, 디자인, 연구, 관리, 사람 이끄는 일 분야에서 강점이 드러나요. 상사 눈치만 보는 자리보다 책임을 맡아 판을 정리할 때 중요한 역할을 맡을 기회가 생겨요. 작은 성과도 수치와 사례로 남기면 새 기회, 제안, 같이 일할 사람이 늘어요. 하고 싶은 일과 잘하는 일 사이에서 한 번은 진지하게 흔들렸습니다. 작은 결과도 기록해두면 나중에 진짜 자기 작품 모음이 돼요.
ko.wealth: 돈은 단발 운보다 분위기가 좌우한다. 갑오은 감각이 좋아도 구조가 없으면 새는 돈이 생겨요. 돈을 모으는 속도가 느려도 잃는 속도도 느린 편이에요. 용돈/지출, 가격, 약속, 모아두는 돈을 분명히 정리하는 게 좋아요. 인기, 속도, 표현력을 돈으로 바꾸는 능력이 있으니 정보, 기술, 취향, 신뢰가 결국 돈이 되는 편이에요. 한 가지를 깊게 하되 돈 들어오는 길은 두 개 이상으로 만들어두면 안정돼요. 당신의 한 가지 취향에는 보통 사람보다 더 많이 쓰는 부분이 있어요. 갑자기 사고 싶어지는 건 보통 자존심이 상할 때 와요 — 그때 조심하세요.
ko.love: 연애는 안정된 인정 위에서만 진심이 자라요. 겉은 담담해도 속으로는 상대의 말투, 약속, 센스를 오래 봐요. 사랑하는 사람에게는 자기 일보다 그 사람 일을 먼저 생각해요. 대화와 취향에서 끌림이 시작되고, 믿음이 쌓이면 현실적인 도움으로 마음을 보여줘요. 밀당보다 일관성이 더 큰 설렘을 만들고, 작은 약속이 애정의 증거가 돼요. 다만 서운함을 시험하듯 돌려 말하면 관계가 피곤해져요. 오해를 한 번 풀지 않으면 다음 단계로 넘어가지 못하는 편이에요. 필요한 말은 타이밍 맞춰 직접 하는 게 좋아요.
ko.health: 건강은 매일의 루틴이 누적되어 결정돼요. 큰나무 같은 큰 나무 면의 기질에 한여름 불기가 더해져 과로하면 잠이 얕아지거나 속이 예민해지는 식으로 몸이 먼저 신호를 보낼 수 있어요. 주변 사람이 당신 컨디션을 당신보다 먼저 알아채요. 버티는 힘이 있어도 방전 뒤 회복은 느려요. 밤늦은 감정 소비와 카페인 의존은 줄이는 편이 좋고, 몸의 작은 경고를 초기에 잡는 게 좋아요. 눈·목·등 부위에 평소보다 더 신호가 자주 와요. 규칙적인 식사, 수분, 스트레칭, 햇빛, 취침 시간을 지키면 운의 컨디션도 안정돼요.
ko.family: 가족 관계는 짐과 자율이 함께 있는 게 좋아요. 원칙, 성장, 보호 본능 때문에 집안에서 믿음직한 사람, 중재자, 조용한 해결사가 되기 쉬워요. 당신이 가족에게 받은 패턴 하나는 의식적으로 끊어야 해요. 그러나 사랑이 자동으로 계속될 거라 생각하면 관계가 식어요. 어른과는 일관된 거리를 유지하고, 형제나 가까운 사람과는 함께 할 일과 각자의 영역을 구분하는 게 좋아요. 집안 문제를 혼자 떠안지 말아야 해요. 가족과의 한 번의 솔직한 대화가 오랜 매듭을 풉니다. 전통은 힘이 되는 것만 남기는 편이 좋아요.
ko.fame: 평판은 변주보다 색의 강도에서 결정돼요. 갑오은 크게 외치기보다 원칙, 성장, 보호 본능과 인기, 속도, 표현력이 반복될 때 이름이 남아요. 당신의 평판은 당신이 생각하는 것보다 좋은 편이에요. 콘텐츠든 직장이든 사람들은 결국 "진짜 그 사람답다"는 기준을 기억해요. 같이 일한 사람의 몫을 인정하면 평판이 오래 가요. 말이 날카로워지는 순간에는 이미지가 빨리 나빠질 수 있으니 사람들 앞에서 감정을 표현할 땐 한 번 더 다듬는 게 좋아요. 주목받기보다 신뢰받는 면이 당신에게 더 잘 맞아요. 꾸준한 결과물이 결국 가장 큰 응원을 부르는 거예요.

en.dayMasterDeep: You have a naturally caring grain. Without trying, you make the room more comfortable. Wood Goat is flexible yin wood seated on dry late summer earth: vine wood roots in warm earth, making artistry, care, and gradual prosperity. Responsible-looking, but part of that load was taken on because saying no is hard. The image is a vine, flower, or lyric line finding the light meeting a warm studio where pain becomes design. This pillar rarely lives as a simple personality type. It studies pressure, reads timing, and then finds a personal rhythm that can look effortless from outside. The Day Master carries adaptation, taste, and relational intelligence, while the Goat branch adds taste, care, memory, and creative endurance. Next quarter, a self-limit you assumed will start to bend. Together they create someone who can move between instinct and planning, public polish and private calculation. In a K-pop story, this is the member whose fancam looks natural because hundreds of unseen choices were made before the light came on. Strength grows when confidence is paired with honest feedback. The weak point is over-bending until resentment gathers and carrying emotional weight silently; when that pattern takes over, talent becomes defensive instead of magnetic. This pillar succeeds by respecting its own cycle: gather information, refine the move, then act with clean timing. Look again carefully at what you already have.
en.career: Career luck for Wood Goat favors work where adaptation, taste, and relational intelligence can meet taste, care, memory, and creative endurance. This is not a chart that should be trapped in vague effort; it needs a field with visible standards, measurable growth, and room to become known for a signature method. A senior who treats your work as their own brings out your best runs. Suitable paths include strategy, content, design, technology, education, finance, health, beauty, media, research, operations, or leadership, depending on the full chart. The stem gives the working style, while the Goat branch decides the arena: a warm studio where pain becomes design. You tend to notice where a team is wasting motion and can become the person who turns scattered energy into a repeatable system. Authority grows through competence before title. Avoid workplaces that reward only obedience, because your rhythm needs responsibility and creative adjustment. When luck cycles support you, promotions come after you solve a problem others avoided. Your bar runs one notch higher than average. Build a portfolio, track outcomes, and let your reputation speak in clean receipts rather than dramatic claims.
en.wealth: Wealth for Wood Goat develops through controlled timing rather than random luck. Because the pillar combines flexible yin wood with dry late summer earth, money responds when desire is translated into structure: budgets, pricing, assets, repeat customers, and skills that compound. Big spends are usually long-prepared, not impulsive. The Goat branch brings taste, care, memory, and creative endurance, so income can improve through networks, technical knowledge, tasteful selection, property, consulting, negotiation, or a role where information becomes value. You may have strong instincts about trends, but the chart asks you to test them before committing too much capital. Spending is most risky when it tries to soothe over-bending until resentment gathers or carrying emotional weight silently. In good cycles, this pillar can monetize a niche others considered too subtle or too difficult. In weaker cycles, it may hold cash too tightly or chase clever shortcuts. Once burnt, you avoid that area for years. The best wealth practice is simple: separate emotional spending from strategic investment, document every promise, and turn one proven strength into several income channels over time.
en.love: In love, Wood Goat needs both recognition and emotional safety. The Day Master wants to be seen for adaptation, taste, and relational intelligence, while the Goat branch seeks a partner who understands taste, care, memory, and creative endurance without turning it into pressure. Texture of time together matters more than amount. Attraction often begins through conversation, shared taste, competence, or the feeling that the other person has a private world worth entering. You may look composed, but the inner rhythm is more sensitive than outsiders guess. The difficult pattern is testing affection indirectly, especially when over-bending until resentment gathers meets carrying emotional weight silently. This can make partners feel they are auditioning for a comeback stage with hidden judges. Love becomes easier when needs are spoken before disappointment hardens into silence. The best partner respects your timing, keeps promises, and does not shame your ambition or sensitivity. Quick to spot the other's change; slower with your own. Once trust is built, this pillar can be deeply loyal, protective, and quietly romantic, showing devotion through practical support as much as dramatic confession.
en.health: Health for Wood Goat is tied to rhythm, stress processing, and the balance between the stem element and the branch season. Flexible yin wood gives a particular constitutional emphasis, while dry late summer earth adds its own weather. Even with sleep, two or three slumps a year drain you. When life is aligned, energy feels focused and responsive; when overloaded, the body may show tension through sleep, digestion, skin, throat, muscles, circulation, water retention, or nervous sensitivity, depending on the full chart and personal habits. The branch image, a warm studio where pain becomes design, shows why recovery cannot be treated as laziness. This pillar often keeps performing after the internal battery is already low. Preventive care should be practical: regular meals, consistent sleep, stretching, hydration, sunlight or warmth when needed, and fewer emotional decisions made after midnight. Avoid using caffeine, doom-scrolling, or work intensity as a substitute for real regulation. Stop postponing body decisions — even small ones change a lot. The chart benefits from a steady routine that still leaves room for movement, music, travel, or creative release, because stagnant pressure becomes heavier than honest effort.
en.family: Family patterns for Wood Goat often revolve around duty, expectations, and the question of who is allowed to change. The stem shows how you protect people: through adaptation, taste, and relational intelligence. You carry the most responsibility-feeling among the family. The Goat branch shows what you inherited: taste, care, memory, and creative endurance, along with the habit of carrying emotional weight silently. You may become the capable one, the interpreter, the quiet strategist, or the member who carries emotional weather without naming it. This can create respect, but also invisible fatigue. With parents or elders, boundaries work better when they are consistent rather than announced only after resentment peaks. With siblings or chosen family, loyalty deepens through shared projects and honest repair. The pillar should not confuse love with endless availability. Your family luck improves when you keep tradition that gives strength and release tradition that only repeats fear. One family member's influence is wired into your decision pattern. A healthy home for this chart has order, warmth, privacy, and enough room for each person to grow into a new role.
en.fame: Fame and reputation for Wood Goat grow through a recognizable signature. This pillar is not usually remembered for being loud alone; it is remembered when adaptation, taste, and relational intelligence is expressed through the Goat's taste, care, memory, and creative endurance. Recognition that matters is a few people, not a crowd. The public image can feel polished, clever, sincere, mysterious, commanding, or healing depending on how the full chart supports it. In creative fields, you do well when concept and execution match, like a comeback where styling, choreography, vocals, and timing all tell the same story. In professional life, reputation rises when people associate your name with reliable judgment under pressure. Be careful with sharp comments, secrecy, or pride during conflict, because over-bending until resentment gathers can combine with carrying emotional weight silently and make a temporary mood look like a permanent character flaw. The best fame strategy is disciplined consistency: show receipts, honor collaborators, and refine one public lane until the market can identify your color without explanation. Exposing yourself once more during a strong period multiplies the effect. Recognition follows when quality becomes repeatable.

ko.fame: 평판은 흐릿한 색보다 또렷한 색을 보상한다. 을미은 크게 외치기보다 유연함, 감각, 인맥 운과 감성, 돌봄, 예술적 지속력이 반복될 때 이름이 남아요. 인정받고 싶은 사람은 많은 사람이 아니라 단 몇 명입니다. 콘텐츠든 직장이든 사람들은 결국 "진짜 그 사람답다"는 기준을 기억해요. 같이 일한 사람의 몫을 인정하면 평판이 오래 가요. 말이 날카로워지는 순간에는 이미지가 빨리 나빠질 수 있으니 사람들 앞에서 감정을 표현할 땐 한 번 더 다듬는 게 좋아요. 잘 나가는 시기에 당신을 다른 곳에 한 번 더 노출시키면 효과가 커요. 꾸준한 결과물이 결국 가장 큰 응원을 부르는 거예요.

en.dayMasterDeep: Quick and sharp. You may look open, but a fast mind runs underneath. Fire Monkey is radiant yang fire seated on early autumn metal: sun fire meets autumn metal, creating showmanship, competition, and sharp intelligence. Honest with others; a beat slower being honest with yourself. The image is the sun over a stage before the chorus hits meeting a clever performer testing every ladder backstage. This pillar rarely lives as a simple personality type. It studies pressure, reads timing, and then finds a personal rhythm that can look effortless from outside. The Day Master carries visibility, warmth, and brave momentum, while the Monkey branch adds speed, wit, systems, and tactical reinvention. Soon someone will ask for your opinion directly in an unexpected setting. Together they create someone who can move between instinct and planning, public polish and private calculation. In a K-pop story, this is the member whose fancam looks natural because hundreds of unseen choices were made before the light came on. Strength grows when confidence is paired with honest feedback. The weak point is impatience when the room moves too slowly and over-calculating the room; when that pattern takes over, talent becomes defensive instead of magnetic. This pillar succeeds by respecting its own cycle: gather information, refine the move, then act with clean timing. Look again carefully at what you already have.
en.career: Career luck for Fire Monkey favors work where visibility, warmth, and brave momentum can meet speed, wit, systems, and tactical reinvention. This is not a chart that should be trapped in vague effort; it needs a field with visible standards, measurable growth, and room to become known for a signature method. A senior who treats your work as their own brings out your best runs. Suitable paths include strategy, content, design, technology, education, finance, health, beauty, media, research, operations, or leadership, depending on the full chart. The stem gives the working style, while the Monkey branch decides the arena: a clever performer testing every ladder backstage. You tend to notice where a team is wasting motion and can become the person who turns scattered energy into a repeatable system. Authority grows through competence before title. Avoid workplaces that reward only obedience, because your rhythm needs responsibility and creative adjustment. When luck cycles support you, promotions come after you solve a problem others avoided. Mastering one tool or skill is a lifetime asset. Build a portfolio, track outcomes, and let your reputation speak in clean receipts rather than dramatic claims.
en.wealth: Wealth for Fire Monkey develops through controlled timing rather than random luck. Because the pillar combines radiant yang fire with early autumn metal, money responds when desire is translated into structure: budgets, pricing, assets, repeat customers, and skills that compound. Money arrives in one big flow; the average doesn't mean much. The Monkey branch brings speed, wit, systems, and tactical reinvention, so income can improve through networks, technical knowledge, tasteful selection, property, consulting, negotiation, or a role where information becomes value. You may have strong instincts about trends, but the chart asks you to test them before committing too much capital. Spending is most risky when it tries to soothe impatience when the room moves too slowly or over-calculating the room. In good cycles, this pillar can monetize a niche others considered too subtle or too difficult. In weaker cycles, it may hold cash too tightly or chase clever shortcuts. Little regret after a money call; long hesitation before. The best wealth practice is simple: separate emotional spending from strategic investment, document every promise, and turn one proven strength into several income channels over time.
en.love: In love, Fire Monkey needs both recognition and emotional safety. The Day Master wants to be seen for visibility, warmth, and brave momentum, while the Monkey branch seeks a partner who understands speed, wit, systems, and tactical reinvention without turning it into pressure. Texture of time together matters more than amount. Attraction often begins through conversation, shared taste, competence, or the feeling that the other person has a private world worth entering. You may look composed, but the inner rhythm is more sensitive than outsiders guess. The difficult pattern is testing affection indirectly, especially when impatience when the room moves too slowly meets over-calculating the room. This can make partners feel they are auditioning for a comeback stage with hidden judges. Love becomes easier when needs are spoken before disappointment hardens into silence. The best partner respects your timing, keeps promises, and does not shame your ambition or sensitivity. Unresolved misunderstandings block the next step. Once trust is built, this pillar can be deeply loyal, protective, and quietly romantic, showing devotion through practical support as much as dramatic confession.
en.health: Health for Fire Monkey is tied to rhythm, stress processing, and the balance between the stem element and the branch season. Radiant yang fire gives a particular constitutional emphasis, while early autumn metal adds its own weather. Caffeine or sugar gets noticeably stronger in certain phases. When life is aligned, energy feels focused and responsive; when overloaded, the body may show tension through sleep, digestion, skin, throat, muscles, circulation, water retention, or nervous sensitivity, depending on the full chart and personal habits. The branch image, a clever performer testing every ladder backstage, shows why recovery cannot be treated as laziness. This pillar often keeps performing after the internal battery is already low. Preventive care should be practical: regular meals, consistent sleep, stretching, hydration, sunlight or warmth when needed, and fewer emotional decisions made after midnight. Avoid using caffeine, doom-scrolling, or work intensity as a substitute for real regulation. Ignoring a body signal once cost more than expected. The chart benefits from a steady routine that still leaves room for movement, music, travel, or creative release, because stagnant pressure becomes heavier than honest effort.
en.family: Family patterns for Fire Monkey often revolve around duty, expectations, and the question of who is allowed to change. The stem shows how you protect people: through visibility, warmth, and brave momentum. Words come harder with family; the heart still faces that direction. The Monkey branch shows what you inherited: speed, wit, systems, and tactical reinvention, along with the habit of over-calculating the room. You may become the capable one, the interpreter, the quiet strategist, or the member who carries emotional weather without naming it. This can create respect, but also invisible fatigue. With parents or elders, boundaries work better when they are consistent rather than announced only after resentment peaks. With siblings or chosen family, loyalty deepens through shared projects and honest repair. The pillar should not confuse love with endless availability. Your family luck improves when you keep tradition that gives strength and release tradition that only repeats fear. One family member's change moves your mood most. A healthy home for this chart has order, warmth, privacy, and enough room for each person to grow into a new role.
en.fame: Fame and reputation for Fire Monkey grow through a recognizable signature. This pillar is not usually remembered for being loud alone; it is remembered when visibility, warmth, and brave momentum is expressed through the Monkey's speed, wit, systems, and tactical reinvention. You wield real influence in 1-to-1 settings. The public image can feel polished, clever, sincere, mysterious, commanding, or healing depending on how the full chart supports it. In creative fields, you do well when concept and execution match, like a comeback where styling, choreography, vocals, and timing all tell the same story. In professional life, reputation rises when people associate your name with reliable judgment under pressure. Be careful with sharp comments, secrecy, or pride during conflict, because impatience when the room moves too slowly can combine with over-calculating the room and make a temporary mood look like a permanent character flaw. The best fame strategy is disciplined consistency: show receipts, honor collaborators, and refine one public lane until the market can identify your color without explanation. Your reputation is better than you think. Recognition follows when quality becomes repeatable.

ko.dayMasterDeep: 당신은 빠르고 영리한 모습을 가진 사람이에요. 밝게 보이지만 안에서는 빠른 판단이 늘 돌아가고 있어요. 겉으로는 차분해 보여도 한 번 빠진 일에는 누구보다 깊이 들어가요. 태양이 가을 금을 만나 쇼맨십과 경쟁심, 빠른 판단이 함께 사는 경향이 있어서 그래서 마음이 단순하게 움직이기보다, 여러 생각을 한 번 더 거치는 편이에요. 오랫동안 미뤄둔 한 가지가 곧 시간을 강제로 만들어요. 밝은 존재감, 추진력, 리더 기질에 재치, 기술, 전략 감각이 붙어 무대 뒤 계산과 무대 위 존재감이 함께 살아요. 무대 위 안정감은 안쪽의 수많은 반복에서 비롯돼요. 다만 계산이 과하면 신뢰가 늦게 열려요. 거절해야 할 때를 놓치지 마세요.
ko.career: 일과 진로는 밝은 존재감, 추진력, 리더 기질을 재치, 기술, 전략 감각으로 증명할 때 열려요. 단순히 반복되는 일보다 본인 색깔과 결과가 잘 드러나는 일이 잘 맞아요. 상사·선배가 자기 일처럼 챙겨주는 분위기가 운에 잘 맞아요. 기획, 콘텐츠, 기술, 교육, 돈 다루기, 디자인, 연구, 관리, 사람 이끄는 일 분야에서 강점이 드러나요. 상사 눈치만 보는 자리보다 책임을 맡아 판을 정리할 때 중요한 역할을 맡을 기회가 생겨요. 작은 성과도 수치와 사례로 남기면 새 기회, 제안, 같이 일할 사람이 늘어요. 도구·기술 한 가지를 끝까지 익혀두면 평생 운입니다. 작은 결과도 기록해두면 나중에 진짜 자기 작품 모음이 돼요.

The best fame strategy is disciplined consistency: show receipts, honor collaborators, and refine one public lane until the market can identify your color without explanation. The strongest recognition comes from areas you don't display. Recognition follows when quality becomes repeatable.

ko.dayMasterDeep: 당신은 정확하면서 우아한 사람이에요. 작은 디테일을 놓치지 않고, 당신 색을 분명하게 드러내는 면이 있어요. 주변 사람에게는 안정감을 주지만 자기 안에서는 늘 다음 단계를 고민해요. 촛불이 순금에 비쳐 세련미, 정확성, 예민한 자존심이 살아나는 경향이 있어서 그래서 마음이 단순하게 움직이기보다, 여러 생각을 한 번 더 거치는 편이에요. 지난 2년 안에 한 번은 모든 것을 그만두고 싶은 순간이 있었어요. 섬세함, 집중력, 분위기 장악력에 품격, 정확성, 표현력이 붙어 무대 뒤 계산과 무대 위 존재감이 함께 살아요. 겉으로는 자연스러워 보여도 안에서는 미리 많은 준비를 끝낸 사람이에요. 다만 기준이 높아 말이 차갑게 들릴 수 있어요. 큰 그림보다 오늘 한 가지를 잡는 게 답입니다.
ko.career: 일과 진로는 섬세함, 집중력, 분위기 장악력을 품격, 정확성, 표현력으로 증명할 때 열려요. 단순히 반복되는 일보다 본인 색깔과 결과가 잘 드러나는 일이 잘 맞아요. 한 번 본 결과를 머릿속에서 끝까지 그릴 줄 아는 능력이 있어요. 기획, 콘텐츠, 기술, 교육, 돈 다루기, 디자인, 연구, 관리, 사람 이끄는 일 분야에서 강점이 드러나요. 상사 눈치만 보는 자리보다 책임을 맡아 판을 정리할 때 중요한 역할을 맡을 기회가 생겨요. 작은 성과도 수치와 사례로 남기면 새 기회, 제안, 같이 일할 사람이 늘어요. 당신의 강점을 알아보는 한 사람이 다음 단계를 열어줍니다. 작은 결과도 기록해두면 나중에 진짜 자기 작품 모음이 돼요.
ko.wealth: 돈은 한 번에 터지는 복보다 쌓아 만드는 복이에요. 정유은 감각이 좋아도 구조가 없으면 새는 돈이 생겨요. 당신이 가치 있다고 느끼는 일에는 망설임 없이 쓰는 면이 있어요. 용돈/지출, 가격, 약속, 모아두는 돈을 분명히 정리하는 게 좋아요. 품격, 정확성, 표현력을 돈으로 바꾸는 능력이 있으니 정보, 기술, 취향, 신뢰가 결국 돈이 되는 편이에요. 한 가지를 깊게 하되 돈 들어오는 길은 두 개 이상으로 만들어두면 안정돼요. 당신이 모은 돈보다 누군가에게 빌려준 돈 회수가 의외로 큰 변수입니다. 갑자기 사고 싶어지는 건 보통 자존심이 상할 때 와요 — 그때 조심하세요.
ko.love: 연애는 자존감과 평온이 함께할 때 매력이 살아나요. 겉은 담담해도 속으로는 상대의 말투, 약속, 센스를 오래 봐요. 오해를 한 번 풀지 않으면 다음 단계로 넘어가지 못하는 편이에요. 대화와 취향에서 끌림이 시작되고, 믿음이 쌓이면 현실적인 도움으로 마음을 보여줘요. 밀당보다 일관성이 더 큰 설렘을 만들고, 작은 약속이 애정의 증거가 돼요. 다만 서운함을 시험하듯 돌려 말하면 관계가 피곤해져요. 상대가 먼저 솔직해질 때 당신이 더 깊어집니다. 필요한 말은 타이밍 맞춰 직접 하는 게 좋아요.
ko.health: 건강은 큰 변화보다 작은 습관이 만들어요. 촛불 같은 촛불 작은 불의 기질에 순수한 가을 금기가 더해져 과로하면 잠이 얕아지거나 속이 예민해지는 식으로 몸이 먼저 신호를 보낼 수 있어요. 주변 사람이 당신 컨디션을 당신보다 먼저 알아채요. 버티는 힘이 있어도 방전 뒤 회복은 느려요. 밤늦은 감정 소비와 카페인 의존은 줄이는 편이 좋고, 몸의 작은 경고를 초기에 잡는 게 좋아요. 스트레스가 가장 먼저 몸의 한 곳에 집중되는 패턴이 있어요. 규칙적인 식사, 수분, 스트레칭, 햇빛, 취침 시간을 지키면 운의 컨디션도 안정돼요.
ko.family: 가족 관계는 누가 뭘 할지 정하는 것이 명확할 때 풀려요. 섬세함, 집중력, 분위기 장악력 때문에 집안에서 믿음직한 사람, 중재자, 조용한 해결사가 되기 쉬워요. 당신이 가족 중 가장 책임감을 느끼는 자리에 있어요. 그러나 사랑이 자동으로 계속될 거라 생각하면 관계가 식어요. 어른과는 일관된 거리를 유지하고, 형제나 가까운 사람과는 함께 할 일과 각자의 영역을 구분하는 게 좋아요. 집안 문제를 혼자 떠안지 말아야 해요. 당신이 어렸을 때의 가족 분위기가 지금 인간관계의 기본 톤입니다. 전통은 힘이 되는 것만 남기는 편이 좋아요.
ko.fame: 평판은 자기 색이 선명할수록 커져요. 정유은 크게 외치기보다 섬세함, 집중력, 분위기 장악력과 품격, 정확성, 표현력이 반복될 때 이름이 남아요. 한 번 시작한 일을 끝까지 가는 모습이 당신 브랜드입니다. 콘텐츠든 직장이든 사람들은 결국 "진짜 그 사람답다"는 기준을 기억해요. 같이 일한 사람의 몫을 인정하면 평판이 오래 가요. 말이 날카로워지는 순간에는 이미지가 빨리 나빠질 수 있으니 사람들 앞에서 감정을 표현할 땐 한 번 더 다듬는 게 좋아요. 겉으로 드러내지 않는 영역에서 가장 강한 인정을 받습니다. 꾸준한 결과물이 결국 가장 큰 응원을 부르는 거예요.

en.dayMasterDeep: Grown-up grain. Strong responsibility and you keep the promises you make. Earth Dog is solid yang earth seated on dry late autumn earth: mountain earth doubles with dry earth, forming command, loyalty, and heavy responsibility. Honest with others; a beat slower being honest with yourself. The image is a mountain holding weather without moving meeting a loyal guard at the gate of a hidden studio. This pillar rarely lives as a simple personality type. It studies pressure, reads timing, and then finds a personal rhythm that can look effortless from outside. The Day Master carries stability, scale, and strategic responsibility, while the Dog branch adds loyalty, endurance, boundaries, and moral memory. In the past two years there was a moment when you wanted to quit everything. Together they create someone who can move between instinct and planning, public polish and private calculation. In a K-pop story, this is the member whose fancam looks natural because hundreds of unseen choices were made before the light came on. Strength grows when confidence is paired with honest feedback. The weak point is stubborn control when change arrives and holding old disappointments too long; when that pattern takes over, talent becomes defensive instead of magnetic. This pillar succeeds by respecting its own cycle: gather information, refine the move, then act with clean timing. Writing it down catches the luck.
en.career: Career luck for Earth Dog favors work where stability, scale, and strategic responsibility can meet loyalty, endurance, boundaries, and moral memory. This is not a chart that should be trapped in vague effort; it needs a field with visible standards, measurable growth, and room to become known for a signature method. Mastering one tool or skill is a lifetime asset. Suitable paths include strategy, content, design, technology, education, finance, health, beauty, media, research, operations, or leadership, depending on the full chart. The stem gives the working style, while the Dog branch decides the arena: a loyal guard at the gate of a hidden studio. You tend to notice where a team is wasting motion and can become the person who turns scattered energy into a repeatable system. Authority grows through competence before title. Avoid workplaces that reward only obedience, because your rhythm needs responsibility and creative adjustment. When luck cycles support you, promotions come after you solve a problem others avoided. Your value shows clearer with new collaborators than long-time peers. Build a portfolio, track outcomes, and let your reputation speak in clean receipts rather than dramatic claims.
en.wealth: Wealth for Earth Dog develops through controlled timing rather than random luck. Because the pillar combines solid yang earth with dry late autumn earth, money responds when desire is translated into structure: budgets, pricing, assets, repeat customers, and skills that compound. Once burnt, you avoid that area for years. The Dog branch brings loyalty, endurance, boundaries, and moral memory, so income can improve through networks, technical knowledge, tasteful selection, property, consulting, negotiation, or a role where information becomes value. You may have strong instincts about trends, but the chart asks you to test them before committing too much capital. Spending is most risky when it tries to soothe stubborn control when change arrives or holding old disappointments too long. In good cycles, this pillar can monetize a niche others considered too subtle or too difficult. In weaker cycles, it may hold cash too tightly or chase clever shortcuts. Investment or experience pulls you more naturally than pure saving. The best wealth practice is simple: separate emotional spending from strategic investment, document every promise, and turn one proven strength into several income channels over time.
en.love: In love, Earth Dog needs both recognition and emotional safety. The Day Master wants to be seen for stability, scale, and strategic responsibility, while the Dog branch seeks a partner who understands loyalty, endurance, boundaries, and moral memory without turning it into pressure. When in love, the other's life comes before your own. Attraction often begins through conversation, shared taste, competence, or the feeling that the other person has a private world worth entering. You may look composed, but the inner rhythm is more sensitive than outsiders guess. The difficult pattern is testing affection indirectly, especially when stubborn control when change arrives meets holding old disappointments too long. This can make partners feel they are auditioning for a comeback stage with hidden judges. Love becomes easier when needs are spoken before disappointment hardens into silence. The best partner respects your timing, keeps promises, and does not shame your ambition or sensitivity. When the other opens first, you go deeper. Once trust is built, this pillar can be deeply loyal, protective, and quietly romantic, showing devotion through practical support as much as dramatic confession.
en.health: Health for Earth Dog is tied to rhythm, stress processing, and the balance between the stem element and the branch season. Solid yang earth gives a particular constitutional emphasis, while dry late autumn earth adds its own weather. Caffeine or sugar gets noticeably stronger in certain phases. When life is aligned, energy feels focused and responsive; when overloaded, the body may show tension through sleep, digestion, skin, throat, muscles, circulation, water retention, or nervous sensitivity, depending on the full chart and personal habits. The branch image, a loyal guard at the gate of a hidden studio, shows why recovery cannot be treated as laziness. This pillar often keeps performing after the internal battery is already low. Preventive care should be practical: regular meals, consistent sleep, stretching, hydration, sunlight or warmth when needed, and fewer emotional decisions made after midnight. Avoid using caffeine, doom-scrolling, or work intensity as a substitute for real regulation. Eyes, neck, or back signal more often than other places for you. The chart benefits from a steady routine that still leaves room for movement, music, travel, or creative release, because stagnant pressure becomes heavier than honest effort.
en.family: Family patterns for Earth Dog often revolve around duty, expectations, and the question of who is allowed to change. The stem shows how you protect people: through stability, scale, and strategic responsibility. Writing what you couldn't say to family helps. The Dog branch shows what you inherited: loyalty, endurance, boundaries, and moral memory, along with the habit of holding old disappointments too long. You may become the capable one, the interpreter, the quiet strategist, or the member who carries emotional weather without naming it. This can create respect, but also invisible fatigue. With parents or elders, boundaries work better when they are consistent rather than announced only after resentment peaks. With siblings or chosen family, loyalty deepens through shared projects and honest repair. The pillar should not confuse love with endless availability. Your family luck improves when you keep tradition that gives strength and release tradition that only repeats fear. One family event resets the year's grain. A healthy home for this chart has order, warmth, privacy, and enough room for each person to grow into a new role.
en.fame: Fame and reputation for Earth Dog grow through a recognizable signature. This pillar is not usually remembered for being loud alone; it is remembered when stability, scale, and strategic responsibility is expressed through the Dog's loyalty, endurance, boundaries, and moral memory. One of your strengths is more visible to others than you realize. The public image can feel polished, clever, sincere, mysterious, commanding, or healing depending on how the full chart supports it. In creative fields, you do well when concept and execution match, like a comeback where styling, choreography, vocals, and timing all tell the same story. In professional life, reputation rises when people associate your name with reliable judgment under pressure. Be careful with sharp comments, secrecy, or pride during conflict, because stubborn control when change arrives can combine with holding old disappointments too long and make a temporary mood look like a permanent character flaw. The best fame strategy is disciplined consistency: show receipts, honor collaborators, and refine one public lane until the market can identify your color without explanation. Your reputation is better than you think. Recognition follows when quality becomes repeatable.

ko.fame: 평판은 자기 시그니처가 선명할 때 살아나요. 무술은 크게 외치기보다 책임감, 스케일, 버티는 힘과 의리, 경계심, 오래 버티는 힘이 반복될 때 이름이 남아요. 당신의 한 가지 강점이 외부에 당신이 생각하는 것보다 더 강하게 노출돼 있어요. 콘텐츠든 직장이든 사람들은 결국 "진짜 그 사람답다"는 기준을 기억해요. 같이 일한 사람의 몫을 인정하면 평판이 오래 가요. 말이 날카로워지는 순간에는 이미지가 빨리 나빠질 수 있으니 사람들 앞에서 감정을 표현할 땐 한 번 더 다듬는 게 좋아요. 당신의 평판은 당신이 생각하는 것보다 좋은 편이에요. 꾸준한 결과물이 결국 가장 큰 응원을 부르는 거예요.

en.dayMasterDeep: Soft surface, generous heart with quiet perfectionism — a layered, slow-building grain. Earth Pig is cultivated yin earth seated on winter water beginning: fertile earth receives winter water, creating nurture, imagination, and hidden growth. Decisions look quick from outside; in private you run them again and again. The image is fertile soil that knows what each seed needs meeting a midnight ocean where dreams gather before dawn. This pillar rarely lives as a simple personality type. It studies pressure, reads timing, and then finds a personal rhythm that can look effortless from outside. The Day Master carries care, practical intelligence, and patient shaping, while the Pig branch adds empathy, imagination, travel luck, and hidden learning. An opportunity you let slip will return in similar form. Together they create someone who can move between instinct and planning, public polish and private calculation. In a K-pop story, this is the member whose fancam looks natural because hundreds of unseen choices were made before the light came on. Strength grows when confidence is paired with honest feedback. The weak point is worrying through details that others never see and drifting when decisions need shape; when that pattern takes over, talent becomes defensive instead of magnetic. This pillar succeeds by respecting its own cycle: gather information, refine the move, then act with clean timing. Owning one decision to the end opens the next door.
en.career: Career luck for Earth Pig favors work where care, practical intelligence, and patient shaping can meet empathy, imagination, travel luck, and hidden learning. This is not a chart that should be trapped in vague effort; it needs a field with visible standards, measurable growth, and room to become known for a signature method. Mastering one tool or skill is a lifetime asset. Suitable paths include strategy, content, design, technology, education, finance, health, beauty, media, research, operations, or leadership, depending on the full chart. The stem gives the working style, while the Pig branch decides the arena: a midnight ocean where dreams gather before dawn. You tend to notice where a team is wasting motion and can become the person who turns scattered energy into a repeatable system. Authority grows through competence before title. Avoid workplaces that reward only obedience, because your rhythm needs responsibility and creative adjustment. When luck cycles support you, promotions come after you solve a problem others avoided. Your bar runs one notch higher than average. Build a portfolio, track outcomes, and let your reputation speak in clean receipts rather than dramatic claims.
en.wealth: Wealth for Earth Pig develops through controlled timing rather than random luck. Because the pillar combines cultivated yin earth with winter water beginning, money responds when desire is translated into structure: budgets, pricing, assets, repeat customers, and skills that compound. Money arrives in one big flow; the average doesn't mean much. The Pig branch brings empathy, imagination, travel luck, and hidden learning, so income can improve through networks, technical knowledge, tasteful selection, property, consulting, negotiation, or a role where information becomes value. You may have strong instincts about trends, but the chart asks you to test them before committing too much capital. Spending is most risky when it tries to soothe worrying through details that others never see or drifting when decisions need shape. In good cycles, this pillar can monetize a niche others considered too subtle or too difficult. In weaker cycles, it may hold cash too tightly or chase clever shortcuts. Numbers over instinct give you the sharper financial call. The best wealth practice is simple: separate emotional spending from strategic investment, document every promise, and turn one proven strength into several income channels over time.
en.love: In love, Earth Pig needs both recognition and emotional safety. The Day Master wants to be seen for care, practical intelligence, and patient shaping, while the Pig branch seeks a partner who understands empathy, imagination, travel luck, and hidden learning without turning it into pressure. Silent time you can share — that's the real bond. Attraction often begins through conversation, shared taste, competence, or the feeling that the other person has a private world worth entering. You may look composed, but the inner rhythm is more sensitive than outsiders guess. The difficult pattern is testing affection indirectly, especially when worrying through details that others never see meets drifting when decisions need shape. This can make partners feel they are auditioning for a comeback stage with hidden judges. Love becomes easier when needs are spoken before disappointment hardens into silence. The best partner respects your timing, keeps promises, and does not shame your ambition or sensitivity. If you can't set the pace, interest fades fast. Once trust is built, this pillar can be deeply loyal, protective, and quietly romantic, showing devotion through practical support as much as dramatic confession.
en.health: Health for Earth Pig is tied to rhythm, stress processing, and the balance between the stem element and the branch season. Cultivated yin earth gives a particular constitutional emphasis, while winter water beginning adds its own weather. Changing one eating habit stabilizes you mentally too. When life is aligned, energy feels focused and responsive; when overloaded, the body may show tension through sleep, digestion, skin, throat, muscles, circulation, water retention, or nervous sensitivity, depending on the full chart and personal habits. The branch image, a midnight ocean where dreams gather before dawn, shows why recovery cannot be treated as laziness. This pillar often keeps performing after the internal battery is already low. Preventive care should be practical: regular meals, consistent sleep, stretching, hydration, sunlight or warmth when needed, and fewer emotional decisions made after midnight. Avoid using caffeine, doom-scrolling, or work intensity as a substitute for real regulation. You feel signals before the doctor names them. The chart benefits from a steady routine that still leaves room for movement, music, travel, or creative release, because stagnant pressure becomes heavier than honest effort.
en.family: Family patterns for Earth Pig often revolve around duty, expectations, and the question of who is allowed to change. The stem shows how you protect people: through care, practical intelligence, and patient shaping. One family member's influence is wired into your decision pattern. The Pig branch shows what you inherited: empathy, imagination, travel luck, and hidden learning, along with the habit of drifting when decisions need shape. You may become the capable one, the interpreter, the quiet strategist, or the member who carries emotional weather without naming it. This can create respect, but also invisible fatigue. With parents or elders, boundaries work better when they are consistent rather than announced only after resentment peaks. With siblings or chosen family, loyalty deepens through shared projects and honest repair. The pillar should not confuse love with endless availability. Your family luck improves when you keep tradition that gives strength and release tradition that only repeats fear. Words come harder with family; the heart still faces that direction. A healthy home for this chart has order, warmth, privacy, and enough room for each person to grow into a new role.
en.fame: Fame and reputation for Earth Pig grow through a recognizable signature. This pillar is not usually remembered for being loud alone; it is remembered when care, practical intelligence, and patient shaping is expressed through the Pig's empathy, imagination, travel luck, and hidden learning. Real ability runs one notch above what's visible — you know. The public image can feel polished, clever, sincere, mysterious, commanding, or healing depending on how the full chart supports it. In creative fields, you do well when concept and execution match, like a comeback where styling, choreography, vocals, and timing all tell the same story. In professional life, reputation rises when people associate your name with reliable judgment under pressure. Be careful with sharp comments, secrecy, or pride during conflict, because worrying through details that others never see can combine with drifting when decisions need shape and make a temporary mood look like a permanent character flaw. The best fame strategy is disciplined consistency: show receipts, honor collaborators, and refine one public lane until the market can identify your color without explanation. Trust suits you better than spotlight. Recognition follows when quality becomes repeatable.

ko.dayMasterDeep: 당신은 부드러운 표면 아래 너그러운 마음과 완벽주의가 같이 있는 사람이에요. 조용히 쌓아가는 면이 강해요. 집중력이 평균 이상이지만 잘못된 곳에 쏟으면 빠르게 지칩니다. 논밭이 겨울 물을 받아 상상력과 양육력, 숨은 성장이 생기는 경향이 있어서 그래서 마음이 단순하게 움직이기보다, 여러 생각을 한 번 더 거치는 편이에요. 오랫동안 미뤄둔 한 가지가 곧 시간을 강제로 만들어요. 관리력, 현실감, 길러내는 재주에 공감, 상상력, 배움과 이동 운이 붙어 무대 뒤 계산과 무대 위 존재감이 함께 살아요. 무대 위 안정감은 안쪽의 수많은 반복에서 비롯돼요. 다만 분위기만 따라가면 결정력이 약해져요. 큰 그림보다 오늘 한 가지를 잡는 게 답입니다.
ko.career: 일과 진로는 관리력, 현실감, 길러내는 재주를 공감, 상상력, 배움과 이동 운으로 증명할 때 열려요. 단순히 반복되는 일보다 본인 색깔과 결과가 잘 드러나는 일이 잘 맞아요. 도구·기술 한 가지를 끝까지 익혀두면 평생 운입니다. 기획, 콘텐츠, 기술, 교육, 돈 다루기, 디자인, 연구, 관리, 사람 이끄는 일 분야에서 강점이 드러나요. 상사 눈치만 보는 자리보다 책임을 맡아 판을 정리할 때 중요한 역할을 맡을 기회가 생겨요. 작은 성과도 수치와 사례로 남기면 새 기회, 제안, 같이 일할 사람이 늘어요. 당신이 정한 기준이 다른 사람보다 한 단계 높은 편이에요. 작은 결과도 기록해두면 나중에 진짜 자기 작품 모음이 돼요.
ko.wealth: 돈은 단발 운보다 분위기가 좌우한다. 기해은 감각이 좋아도 구조가 없으면 새는 돈이 생겨요. 돈은 한 번에 크게 들어와요. 평소 평균은 의미가 적어요. 용돈/지출, 가격, 약속, 모아두는 돈을 분명히 정리하는 게 좋아요. 공감, 상상력, 배움과 이동 운을 돈으로 바꾸는 능력이 있으니 정보, 기술, 취향, 신뢰가 결국 돈이 되는 편이에요. 한 가지를 깊게 하되 돈 들어오는 길은 두 개 이상으로 만들어두면 안정돼요. 돈에 관한 결정은 직감보다 숫자로 정리할 때 더 정확해요. 갑자기 사고 싶어지는 건 보통 자존심이 상할 때 와요 — 그때 조심하세요.
ko.love: 연애는 안정된 인정 위에서만 진심이 자라요. 겉은 담담해도 속으로는 상대의 말투, 약속, 센스를 오래 봐요. 말 없는 시간을 편하게 보낼 수 있는 사람이 진짜 인연입니다. 대화와 취향에서 끌림이 시작되고, 믿음이 쌓이면 현실적인 도움으로 마음을 보여줘요. 밀당보다 일관성이 더 큰 설렘을 만들고, 작은 약속이 애정의 증거가 돼요. 다만 서운함을 시험하듯 돌려 말하면 관계가 피곤해져요. 관계에서 페이스를 당신이 잡지 못하면 빠르게 흥미를 잃습니다. 필요한 말은 타이밍 맞춰 직접 하는 게 좋아요.
ko.health: 건강은 매일의 루틴이 누적되어 결정돼요. 논밭 같은 작은 들판 흙 면의 기질에 겨울이 여는 물기가 더해져 과로하면 잠이 얕아지거나 속이 예민해지는 식으로 몸이 먼저 신호를 보낼 수 있어요. 당신 식습관 중 한 가지를 바꾸면 정신적 안정도 같이 와요. 버티는 힘이 있어도 방전 뒤 회복은 느려요. 밤늦은 감정 소비와 카페인 의존은 줄이는 편이 좋고, 몸의 작은 경고를 초기에 잡는 게 좋아요. 의사가 말하기 전에 당신이 먼저 느끼는 신호가 있어요. 규칙적인 식사, 수분, 스트레칭, 햇빛, 취침 시간을 지키면 운의 컨디션도 안정돼요.
ko.family: 가족 관계는 짐과 자율이 함께 있는 게 좋아요. 관리력, 현실감, 길러내는 재주 때문에 집안에서 믿음직한 사람, 중재자, 조용한 해결사가 되기 쉬워요. 가족 중 한 명에게 받은 영향이 결정 패턴에 깊이 남아 있어요. 그러나 사랑이 자동으로 계속될 거라 생각하면 관계가 식어요. 어른과는 일관된 거리를 유지하고, 형제나 가까운 사람과는 함께 할 일과 각자의 영역을 구분하는 게 좋아요. 집안 문제를 혼자 떠안지 말아야 해요. 가족에게는 표현이 더 어색하지만 진심은 늘 그쪽으로 향해 있어요. 전통은 힘이 되는 것만 남기는 편이 좋아요.
ko.fame: 평판은 변주보다 색의 강도에서 결정돼요. 기해은 크게 외치기보다 관리력, 현실감, 길러내는 재주와 공감, 상상력, 배움과 이동 운이 반복될 때 이름이 남아요. 진짜 능력은 보이는 것보다 한 단계 위에 있다고 당신이 알고 있어요. 콘텐츠든 직장이든 사람들은 결국 "진짜 그 사람답다"는 기준을 기억해요. 같이 일한 사람의 몫을 인정하면 평판이 오래 가요. 말이 날카로워지는 순간에는 이미지가 빨리 나빠질 수 있으니 사람들 앞에서 감정을 표현할 땐 한 번 더 다듬는 게 좋아요. 주목받기보다 신뢰받는 면이 당신에게 더 잘 맞아요. 꾸준한 결과물이 결국 가장 큰 응원을 부르는 거예요.

Be careful with sharp comments, secrecy, or pride during conflict, because bluntness before trust has formed can combine with thinking so much that the heart waits and make a temporary mood look like a permanent character flaw. The best fame strategy is disciplined consistency: show receipts, honor collaborators, and refine one public lane until the market can identify your color without explanation. Your results outlast your title. Recognition follows when quality becomes repeatable.

ko.dayMasterDeep: 당신은 명확하고 결단력 있는 사람이에요. 한 번 정한 방향은 빠르게 밀고 나가는 면이 강해요. 낯선 자리에서는 한 발 물러서 관찰하지만 친해진 사람에게는 다른 사람이 돼요. 강철이 겨울 물을 낳아 냉정한 전략, 신경의 예민함, 정보력이 강한 경향이 있어서 그래서 마음이 단순하게 움직이기보다, 여러 생각을 한 번 더 거치는 편이에요. 예상하지 못한 사람이 인생의 멘토 자리에 들어와요. 결단력, 정의감, 실행력에 정보력, 눈치, 타이밍이 붙어 무대 뒤 계산과 무대 위 존재감이 함께 살아요. 드라마 주연 같은 자연스러움 뒤엔 침묵의 연습이 쌓여 있어요. 다만 머리가 앞서면 감정 표현이 늦어진다. 큰 그림보다 오늘 한 가지를 잡는 게 답입니다.
ko.career: 일과 진로는 결단력, 정의감, 실행력을 정보력, 눈치, 타이밍으로 증명할 때 열려요. 단순히 반복되는 일보다 본인 색깔과 결과가 잘 드러나는 일이 잘 맞아요. 한 단계씩 끝내고 다음으로 넘어가는 스타일이에요. 기획, 콘텐츠, 기술, 교육, 돈 다루기, 디자인, 연구, 관리, 사람 이끄는 일 분야에서 강점이 드러나요. 상사 눈치만 보는 자리보다 책임을 맡아 판을 정리할 때 중요한 역할을 맡을 기회가 생겨요. 작은 성과도 수치와 사례로 남기면 새 기회, 제안, 같이 일할 사람이 늘어요. 한 번 본 결과를 머릿속에서 끝까지 그릴 줄 아는 능력이 있어요. 작은 결과도 기록해두면 나중에 진짜 자기 작품 모음이 돼요.
ko.wealth: 돈은 큰 한 방보다 길게 다지는 인내가 답이에요. 경자은 감각이 좋아도 구조가 없으면 새는 돈이 생겨요. 돈을 쓸 때 죄책감과 합리화 사이에서 한 번씩 흔들려요. 용돈/지출, 가격, 약속, 모아두는 돈을 분명히 정리하는 게 좋아요. 정보력, 눈치, 타이밍을 돈으로 바꾸는 능력이 있으니 정보, 기술, 취향, 신뢰가 결국 돈이 되는 편이에요. 한 가지를 깊게 하되 돈 들어오는 길은 두 개 이상으로 만들어두면 안정돼요. 돈을 모으는 속도가 느려도 잃는 속도도 느린 편이에요. 갑자기 사고 싶어지는 건 보통 자존심이 상할 때 와요 — 그때 조심하세요.
ko.love: 연애는 인정과 약속의 일관성이 깊이를 만들어요. 겉은 담담해도 속으로는 상대의 말투, 약속, 센스를 오래 봐요. 상대의 작은 변화는 빠르게 감지하지만 당신 변화는 늦게 알아챕니다. 대화와 취향에서 끌림이 시작되고, 믿음이 쌓이면 현실적인 도움으로 마음을 보여줘요. 밀당보다 일관성이 더 큰 설렘을 만들고, 작은 약속이 애정의 증거가 돼요. 다만 서운함을 시험하듯 돌려 말하면 관계가 피곤해져요. 사랑한다는 말보다 행동으로 확인받고 싶어 하는 편이에요. 필요한 말은 타이밍 맞춰 직접 하는 게 좋아요.
ko.health: 건강은 휴식의 질이 결정한다. 강철 같은 단단한 쇠 면의 기질에 한겨울 물기가 더해져 과로하면 잠이 얕아지거나 속이 예민해지는 식으로 몸이 먼저 신호를 보낼 수 있어요. 몸을 위한 결정을 미루는 습관 하나만 줄여도 큰 변화가 와요. 버티는 힘이 있어도 방전 뒤 회복은 느려요. 밤늦은 감정 소비와 카페인 의존은 줄이는 편이 좋고, 몸의 작은 경고를 초기에 잡는 게 좋아요. 늦은 밤 결정이 다음 날 컨디션을 망치는 패턴이 있어요. 규칙적인 식사, 수분, 스트레칭, 햇빛, 취침 시간을 지키면 운의 컨디션도 안정돼요.
ko.family: 가족 관계는 의무와 자유의 양립에서 풀려요. 결단력, 정의감, 실행력 때문에 집안에서 믿음직한 사람, 중재자, 조용한 해결사가 되기 쉬워요. 가족 안에서 당신 위치가 외부에서의 위치와 다릅니다. 그러나 사랑이 자동으로 계속될 거라 생각하면 관계가 식어요. 어른과는 일관된 거리를 유지하고, 형제나 가까운 사람과는 함께 할 일과 각자의 영역을 구분하는 게 좋아요. 집안 문제를 혼자 떠안지 말아야 해요. 당신이 어렸을 때의 가족 분위기가 지금 인간관계의 기본 톤입니다. 전통은 힘이 되는 것만 남기는 편이 좋아요.
ko.fame: 평판은 자기 시그니처가 선명할 때 살아나요. 경자은 크게 외치기보다 결단력, 정의감, 실행력과 정보력, 눈치, 타이밍이 반복될 때 이름이 남아요. 결과보다 과정을 더 봐주는 사람을 만나는 게 당신에게 맞습니다. 콘텐츠든 직장이든 사람들은 결국 "진짜 그 사람답다"는 기준을 기억해요. 같이 일한 사람의 몫을 인정하면 평판이 오래 가요. 말이 날카로워지는 순간에는 이미지가 빨리 나빠질 수 있으니 사람들 앞에서 감정을 표현할 땐 한 번 더 다듬는 게 좋아요. 당신이 가진 명함보다 당신이 만든 결과가 더 길게 가요. 꾸준한 결과물이 결국 가장 큰 응원을 부르는 거예요.

en.dayMasterDeep: Precise and firm. You catch fine detail; your standard is clear. Metal Ox is refined yin metal seated on cold late winter earth: jewel metal rests in cold storage, giving refinement, reserve, and durable value. Easy-going usually, but the moment one true standard is crossed, you turn firm. The image is a jewel cut until every edge catches light meeting a frozen field where value matures slowly. This pillar rarely lives as a simple personality type. It studies pressure, reads timing, and then finds a personal rhythm that can look effortless from outside. The Day Master carries precision, elegance, and exact judgment, while the Ox branch adds patience, storage, realism, and stubborn reliability. A big call arrives naturally between next spring and summer. Together they create someone who can move between instinct and planning, public polish and private calculation. In a K-pop story, this is the member whose fancam looks natural because hundreds of unseen choices were made before the light came on. Strength grows when confidence is paired with honest feedback. The weak point is perfectionism that makes warmth look distant and clinging to old security; when that pattern takes over, talent becomes defensive instead of magnetic. This pillar succeeds by respecting its own cycle: gather information, refine the move, then act with clean timing. Cut one habit of comparing yourself to others; a bigger shift follows.
en.career: Career luck for Metal Ox favors work where precision, elegance, and exact judgment can meet patience, storage, realism, and stubborn reliability. This is not a chart that should be trapped in vague effort; it needs a field with visible standards, measurable growth, and room to become known for a signature method. When you get used to the spotlight, things move quickly. Suitable paths include strategy, content, design, technology, education, finance, health, beauty, media, research, operations, or leadership, depending on the full chart. The stem gives the working style, while the Ox branch decides the arena: a frozen field where value matures slowly. You tend to notice where a team is wasting motion and can become the person who turns scattered energy into a repeatable system. Authority grows through competence before title. Avoid workplaces that reward only obedience, because your rhythm needs responsibility and creative adjustment. When luck cycles support you, promotions come after you solve a problem others avoided. Big change doesn't arrive from afar — you pull it in. Build a portfolio, track outcomes, and let your reputation speak in clean receipts rather than dramatic claims.
en.wealth: Wealth for Metal Ox develops through controlled timing rather than random luck. Because the pillar combines refined yin metal with cold late winter earth, money responds when desire is translated into structure: budgets, pricing, assets, repeat customers, and skills that compound. Little regret after a money call; long hesitation before. The Ox branch brings patience, storage, realism, and stubborn reliability, so income can improve through networks, technical knowledge, tasteful selection, property, consulting, negotiation, or a role where information becomes value. You may have strong instincts about trends, but the chart asks you to test them before committing too much capital. Spending is most risky when it tries to soothe perfectionism that makes warmth look distant or clinging to old security. In good cycles, this pillar can monetize a niche others considered too subtle or too difficult. In weaker cycles, it may hold cash too tightly or chase clever shortcuts. Anxiety and confidence about money sit at equal strength. The best wealth practice is simple: separate emotional spending from strategic investment, document every promise, and turn one proven strength into several income channels over time.
en.love: In love, Metal Ox needs both recognition and emotional safety. The Day Master wants to be seen for precision, elegance, and exact judgment, while the Ox branch seeks a partner who understands patience, storage, realism, and stubborn reliability without turning it into pressure. Quick to spot the other's change; slower with your own. Attraction often begins through conversation, shared taste, competence, or the feeling that the other person has a private world worth entering. You may look composed, but the inner rhythm is more sensitive than outsiders guess. The difficult pattern is testing affection indirectly, especially when perfectionism that makes warmth look distant meets clinging to old security. This can make partners feel they are auditioning for a comeback stage with hidden judges. Love becomes easier when needs are spoken before disappointment hardens into silence. The best partner respects your timing, keeps promises, and does not shame your ambition or sensitivity. You fall for someone who listens to your taste in music. Once trust is built, this pillar can be deeply loyal, protective, and quietly romantic, showing devotion through practical support as much as dramatic confession.
en.health: Health for Metal Ox is tied to rhythm, stress processing, and the balance between the stem element and the branch season. Refined yin metal gives a particular constitutional emphasis, while cold late winter earth adds its own weather. Caffeine or sugar gets noticeably stronger in certain phases. When life is aligned, energy feels focused and responsive; when overloaded, the body may show tension through sleep, digestion, skin, throat, muscles, circulation, water retention, or nervous sensitivity, depending on the full chart and personal habits. The branch image, a frozen field where value matures slowly, shows why recovery cannot be treated as laziness. This pillar often keeps performing after the internal battery is already low. Preventive care should be practical: regular meals, consistent sleep, stretching, hydration, sunlight or warmth when needed, and fewer emotional decisions made after midnight. Avoid using caffeine, doom-scrolling, or work intensity as a substitute for real regulation. You react more to season changes than most. The chart benefits from a steady routine that still leaves room for movement, music, travel, or creative release, because stagnant pressure becomes heavier than honest effort.
en.family: Family patterns for Metal Ox often revolve around duty, expectations, and the question of who is allowed to change. The stem shows how you protect people: through precision, elegance, and exact judgment. Words come harder with family; the heart still faces that direction. The Ox branch shows what you inherited: patience, storage, realism, and stubborn reliability, along with the habit of clinging to old security. You may become the capable one, the interpreter, the quiet strategist, or the member who carries emotional weather without naming it. This can create respect, but also invisible fatigue. With parents or elders, boundaries work better when they are consistent rather than announced only after resentment peaks. With siblings or chosen family, loyalty deepens through shared projects and honest repair. The pillar should not confuse love with endless availability. Your family luck improves when you keep tradition that gives strength and release tradition that only repeats fear. At family gatherings you're the last one to drop the guard. A healthy home for this chart has order, warmth, privacy, and enough room for each person to grow into a new role.
en.fame: Fame and reputation for Metal Ox grow through a recognizable signature. This pillar is not usually remembered for being loud alone; it is remembered when precision, elegance, and exact judgment is expressed through the Ox's patience, storage, realism, and stubborn reliability. Exposing yourself once more during a strong period multiplies the effect. The public image can feel polished, clever, sincere, mysterious, commanding, or healing depending on how the full chart supports it. In creative fields, you do well when concept and execution match, like a comeback where styling, choreography, vocals, and timing all tell the same story. The best fame strategy is disciplined consistency: show receipts, honor collaborators, and refine one public lane until the market can identify your color without explanation. Trust suits you better than spotlight. Recognition follows when quality becomes repeatable.

ko.health: 건강은 큰 변화보다 작은 습관이 만들어요. 예민하게 감지하는 기질에 늦겨울 젖은 토가 더해져 과로하면 잠이 얕아지거나 속이 예민해지는 식으로 몸이 먼저 신호를 보낼 수 있어요. 카페인·당분에 평소보다 더 예민한 시기가 있어요. 버티는 힘이 있어도 방전 뒤 회복은 느려요. 밤늦은 감정 소비와 카페인 의존은 줄이는 편이 좋고, 몸의 작은 경고를 초기에 잡는 게 좋아요. 계절 변화에 다른 사람보다 영향을 더 받는 면이 있어요. 규칙적인 식사, 수분, 스트레칭, 햇빛, 취침 시간을 지키면 운의 컨디션도 안정돼요.
ko.family: 가족 관계는 누가 뭘 할지 정하는 것이 명확할 때 풀려요. 꼼꼼하고 깔끔한 성격 덕에 집안에서 믿음직한 사람, 중재자, 조용한 해결사가 되기 쉬워요. 가족에게는 표현이 더 어색하지만 진심은 늘 그쪽으로 향해 있어요. 그러나 사랑이 자동으로 계속될 거라 생각하면 관계가 식어요. 어른과는 일관된 거리를 유지하고, 형제나 가까운 사람과는 함께 할 일과 각자의 영역을 구분하는 게 좋아요. 집안 문제를 혼자 떠안지 말아야 해요. 가족 행사에서 당신이 가장 늦게 솔직해지는 사람입니다. 전통은 힘이 되는 것만 남기는 편이 좋아요.
ko.fame: 평판은 자기 색이 선명할수록 커져요. 신축은 크게 외치기보다 정교함, 품격, 판단력과 저장력, 성실함, 현실 감각이 반복될 때 이름이 남아요. 잘 나가는 시기에 당신을 다른 곳에 한 번 더 노출시키면 효과가 커요. 콘텐츠든 직장이든 사람들은 결국 "진짜 그 사람답다"는 기준을 기억해요. 같이 일한 사람의 몫을 인정하면 평판이 오래 가요. 말이 날카로워지는 순간에는 이미지가 빨리 나빠질 수 있으니 사람들 앞에서 감정을 표현할 땐 한 번 더 다듬는 게 좋아요. 주목받기보다 신뢰받는 면이 당신에게 더 잘 맞아요. 꾸준한 결과물이 결국 가장 큰 응원을 부르는 거예요.

en.dayMasterDeep: Intuition with push. You read flow fast and act immediately. Water Tiger is vast yang water seated on spring wood ignition: ocean water feeds spring tiger wood, creating movement, learning, and bold expansion. Easy-going usually, but the moment one true standard is crossed, you turn firm. The image is an ocean current carrying ships and secrets meeting a dawn tiger breaking the first beat of spring. This pillar rarely lives as a simple personality type. It studies pressure, reads timing, and then finds a personal rhythm that can look effortless from outside. The Day Master carries range, strategy, and fearless movement, while the Tiger branch adds courage, launch power, vision, and righteous heat. A few years ago, a moment quietly asked: should I keep going this way? Together they create someone who can move between instinct and planning, public polish and private calculation. In a K-pop story, this is the member whose fancam looks natural because hundreds of unseen choices were made before the light came on. Strength grows when confidence is paired with honest feedback. The weak point is restlessness when life asks for one lane and rushing before the team is ready; when that pattern takes over, talent becomes defensive instead of magnetic. This pillar succeeds by respecting its own cycle: gather information, refine the move, then act with clean timing. Trust your instinct one more time.
en.career: Career luck for Water Tiger favors work where range, strategy, and fearless movement can meet courage, launch power, vision, and righteous heat. This is not a chart that should be trapped in vague effort; it needs a field with visible standards, measurable growth, and room to become known for a signature method. Look stable; inside, the wish for one big change is real. Suitable paths include strategy, content, design, technology, education, finance, health, beauty, media, research, operations, or leadership, depending on the full chart. The stem gives the working style, while the Tiger branch decides the arena: a dawn tiger breaking the first beat of spring. You tend to notice where a team is wasting motion and can become the person who turns scattered energy into a repeatable system. Authority grows through competence before title. Avoid workplaces that reward only obedience, because your rhythm needs responsibility and creative adjustment. When luck cycles support you, promotions come after you solve a problem others avoided. Your bar runs one notch higher than average. Build a portfolio, track outcomes, and let your reputation speak in clean receipts rather than dramatic claims.
en.wealth: Wealth for Water Tiger develops through controlled timing rather than random luck. Because the pillar combines vast yang water with spring wood ignition, money responds when desire is translated into structure: budgets, pricing, assets, repeat customers, and skills that compound. Slower to gather, slower to lose — your rhythm. The Tiger branch brings courage, launch power, vision, and righteous heat, so income can improve through networks, technical knowledge, tasteful selection, property, consulting, negotiation, or a role where information becomes value. You may have strong instincts about trends, but the chart asks you to test them before committing too much capital. Spending is most risky when it tries to soothe restlessness when life asks for one lane or rushing before the team is ready. In good cycles, this pillar can monetize a niche others considered too subtle or too difficult. In weaker cycles, it may hold cash too tightly or chase clever shortcuts. About 70% of what you spend serves relationships, not pure self-pleasure. The best wealth practice is simple: separate emotional spending from strategic investment, document every promise, and turn one proven strength into several income channels over time.
en.love: In love, Water Tiger needs both recognition and emotional safety. The Day Master wants to be seen for range, strategy, and fearless movement, while the Tiger branch seeks a partner who understands courage, launch power, vision, and righteous heat without turning it into pressure. Your ideal type is clear; the people you actually fall for rarely match it. Attraction often begins through conversation, shared taste, competence, or the feeling that the other person has a private world worth entering. You may look composed, but the inner rhythm is more sensitive than outsiders guess. The difficult pattern is testing affection indirectly, especially when restlessness when life asks for one lane meets rushing before the team is ready. This can make partners feel they are auditioning for a comeback stage with hidden judges. Love becomes easier when needs are spoken before disappointment hardens into silence. The best partner respects your timing, keeps promises, and does not shame your ambition or sensitivity. You're more likely to walk away quietly than to be hurt. Once trust is built, this pillar can be deeply loyal, protective, and quietly romantic, showing devotion through practical support as much as dramatic confession.
en.health: Health for Water Tiger is tied to rhythm, stress processing, and the balance between the stem element and the branch season. Vast yang water gives a particular constitutional emphasis, while spring wood ignition adds its own weather. Eyes, neck, or back signal more often than other places for you. When life is aligned, energy feels focused and responsive; when overloaded, the body may show tension through sleep, digestion, skin, throat, muscles, circulation, water retention, or nervous sensitivity, depending on the full chart and personal habits. The branch image, a dawn tiger breaking the first beat of spring, shows why recovery cannot be treated as laziness. This pillar often keeps performing after the internal battery is already low. Preventive care should be practical: regular meals, consistent sleep, stretching, hydration, sunlight or warmth when needed, and fewer emotional decisions made after midnight. Avoid using caffeine, doom-scrolling, or work intensity as a substitute for real regulation. Late-night choices wreck the next day; you've noticed the pattern. The chart benefits from a steady routine that still leaves room for movement, music, travel, or creative release, because stagnant pressure becomes heavier than honest effort.
en.family: Family patterns for Water Tiger often revolve around duty, expectations, and the question of who is allowed to change. The stem shows how you protect people: through range, strategy, and fearless movement. A childhood scene sets the tone of your relationships today. The Tiger branch shows what you inherited: courage, launch power, vision, and righteous heat, along with the habit of rushing before the team is ready. You may become the capable one, the interpreter, the quiet strategist, or the member who carries emotional weather without naming it. This can create respect, but also invisible fatigue. With parents or elders, boundaries work better when they are consistent rather than announced only after resentment peaks. With siblings or chosen family, loyalty deepens through shared projects and honest repair. The pillar should not confuse love with endless availability. Your family luck improves when you keep tradition that gives strength and release tradition that only repeats fear. One inherited pattern from family is yours to consciously break. A healthy home for this chart has order, warmth, privacy, and enough room for each person to grow into a new role.
en.fame: Fame and reputation for Water Tiger grow through a recognizable signature. This pillar is not usually remembered for being loud alone; it is remembered when range, strategy, and fearless movement is expressed through the Tiger's courage, launch power, vision, and righteous heat. Soon your name appears unexpectedly in one room. The public image can feel polished, clever, sincere, mysterious, commanding, or healing depending on how the full chart supports it. In creative fields, you do well when concept and execution match, like a comeback where styling, choreography, vocals, and timing all tell the same story. In professional life, reputation rises when people associate your name with reliable judgment under pressure. Be careful with sharp comments, secrecy, or pride during conflict, because restlessness when life asks for one lane can combine with rushing before the team is ready and make a temporary mood look like a permanent character flaw. The best fame strategy is disciplined consistency: show receipts, honor collaborators, and refine one public lane until the market can identify your color without explanation. One of your strengths is more visible to others than you realize. Recognition follows when quality becomes repeatable.

ko.dayMasterDeep: 당신은 직관과 추진력이 같이 있는 사람이에요. 큰 분위기를 읽는 능력이 빠르고, 결정하면 곧장 행동해요. 주변 사람에게는 안정감을 주지만 자기 안에서는 늘 다음 단계를 고민해요. 바다가 봄 호랑이를 먹여 이동, 학습, 과감한 확장이 살아나는 경향이 있어서 그래서 마음이 단순하게 움직이기보다, 여러 생각을 한 번 더 거치는 편이에요. 지금 머릿속에 있는 한 사람이 다음 단계의 열쇠가 돼요. 확장성, 전략, 이동 운에 개척력, 용기, 사람 이끄는 능력이 붙어 무대 뒤 계산과 무대 위 존재감이 함께 살아요. 브랜드의 미니멀한 라벨처럼, 단순함 뒤에 디테일이 압축되어 있어요. 다만 앞서가다 주변 호흡을 놓치기 쉬워요. 도움을 청하는 것이 약함이 아니라 기회를 여는 신호입니다.
ko.career: 일과 진로는 확장성, 전략, 이동 운을 개척력, 용기, 사람 이끄는 능력으로 증명할 때 열려요. 단순히 반복되는 일보다 본인 색깔과 결과가 잘 드러나는 일이 잘 맞아요. 겉으로는 안정 지향처럼 보여도 속으로는 한 번 크게 바꾸고 싶은 욕구가 있어요. 기획, 콘텐츠, 기술, 교육, 돈 다루기, 디자인, 연구, 관리, 사람 이끄는 일 분야에서 강점이 드러나요. 상사 눈치만 보는 자리보다 책임을 맡아 판을 정리할 때 중요한 역할을 맡을 기회가 생겨요. 작은 성과도 수치와 사례로 남기면 새 기회, 제안, 같이 일할 사람이 늘어요. 당신이 정한 기준이 다른 사람보다 한 단계 높은 편이에요. 작은 결과도 기록해두면 나중에 진짜 자기 작품 모음이 돼요.
ko.wealth: 돈은 즉시 효과보다 지속되는 복으로 풀려요. 임인은 감각이 좋아도 구조가 없으면 새는 돈이 생겨요. 돈을 모으는 속도가 느려도 잃는 속도도 느린 편이에요. 용돈/지출, 가격, 약속, 모아두는 돈을 분명히 정리하는 게 좋아요. 개척력, 용기, 사람 이끄는 능력을 돈으로 바꾸는 능력이 있으니 정보, 기술, 취향, 신뢰가 결국 돈이 되는 편이에요. 한 가지를 깊게 하되 돈 들어오는 길은 두 개 이상으로 만들어두면 안정돼요. 당신이 쓰는 돈의 70%는 당신 만족이 아닌 관계 챙기기에 쓰여요. 갑자기 사고 싶어지는 건 보통 자존심이 상할 때 와요 — 그때 조심하세요.
ko.love: 연애는 칭찬과 안정감이 관계를 단단하게 해요. 겉은 담담해도 속으로는 상대의 말투, 약속, 센스를 오래 봐요. 이상형은 분명한데 실제로 끌리는 사람은 그 조건에 안 맞는 경우가 많습니다. 대화와 취향에서 끌림이 시작되고, 믿음이 쌓이면 현실적인 도움으로 마음을 보여줘요. 밀당보다 일관성이 더 큰 설렘을 만들고, 작은 약속이 애정의 증거가 돼요. 다만 서운함을 시험하듯 돌려 말하면 관계가 피곤해져요. 연애에서 상처받기보다 당신이 멈춰 떠나는 쪽이 더 익숙해요. 필요한 말은 타이밍 맞춰 직접 하는 게 좋아요.
ko.health: 건강은 리듬 관리가 핵심이에요. 바다 같은 큰 물 면의 기질에 봄을 여는 목기가 더해져 과로하면 잠이 얕아지거나 속이 예민해지는 식으로 몸이 먼저 신호를 보낼 수 있어요. 눈·목·등 부위에 평소보다 더 신호가 자주 와요. 버티는 힘이 있어도 방전 뒤 회복은 느려요. 밤늦은 감정 소비와 카페인 의존은 줄이는 편이 좋고, 몸의 작은 경고를 초기에 잡는 게 좋아요. 늦은 밤 결정이 다음 날 컨디션을 망치는 패턴이 있어요. 규칙적인 식사, 수분, 스트레칭, 햇빛, 취침 시간을 지키면 운의 컨디션도 안정돼요.
ko.family: 가족 관계는 사랑과 경계의 균형이 핵심이에요. 확장성, 전략, 이동 운 때문에 집안에서 믿음직한 사람, 중재자, 조용한 해결사가 되기 쉬워요. 어릴 때의 한 장면이 지금까지도 인간관계 방향을 정해요. 그러나 사랑이 자동으로 계속될 거라 생각하면 관계가 식어요. 어른과는 일관된 거리를 유지하고, 형제나 가까운 사람과는 함께 할 일과 각자의 영역을 구분하는 게 좋아요. 집안 문제를 혼자 떠안지 말아야 해요. 당신이 가족에게 받은 패턴 하나는 의식적으로 끊어야 해요. 전통은 힘이 되는 것만 남기는 편이 좋아요.
ko.fame: 평판은 흐릿한 색보다 또렷한 색을 보상한다. 임인은 크게 외치기보다 확장성, 전략, 이동 운과 개척력, 용기, 사람 이끄는 능력이 반복될 때 이름이 남아요. 곧 당신 이름이 한 자리에서 의외로 나와요. 콘텐츠든 직장이든 사람들은 결국 "진짜 그 사람답다"는 기준을 기억해요. 같이 일한 사람의 몫을 인정하면 평판이 오래 가요. 말이 날카로워지는 순간에는 이미지가 빨리 나빠질 수 있으니 사람들 앞에서 감정을 표현할 땐 한 번 더 다듬는 게 좋아요. 당신의 한 가지 강점이 외부에 당신이 생각하는 것보다 더 강하게 노출돼 있어요. 꾸준한 결과물이 결국 가장 큰 응원을 부르는 거예요.

In creative fields, you do well when concept and execution match, like a comeback where styling, choreography, vocals, and timing all tell the same story. In professional life, reputation rises when people associate your name with reliable judgment under pressure. Be careful with sharp comments, secrecy, or pride during conflict, because withdrawal when emotions become too loud can combine with avoiding conflict until it becomes larger and make a temporary mood look like a permanent character flaw. The best fame strategy is disciplined consistency: show receipts, honor collaborators, and refine one public lane until the market can identify your color without explanation. Soon your name appears unexpectedly in one room. Recognition follows when quality becomes repeatable.

ko.dayMasterDeep: 당신은 부드러우면서도 영리한 사람이에요. 표현은 절제하지만 안에서는 풍부한 통찰이 흐르고 있어요. 집중력이 평균 이상이지만 잘못된 곳에 쏟으면 빠르게 지칩니다. 비가 순수한 봄나무를 길러 부드러운 매력, 문화 운, 섬세함이 강한 경향이 있어서 그래서 마음이 단순하게 움직이기보다, 여러 생각을 한 번 더 거치는 편이에요. 한 번도 시도하지 않은 영역에서 가장 자연스러운 당신이 나와요. 직감, 섬세함, 지적 흡수력에 매력, 미감, 조율 능력이 붙어 무대 뒤 계산과 무대 위 존재감이 함께 살아요. 브랜드의 미니멀한 라벨처럼, 단순함 뒤에 디테일이 압축되어 있어요. 다만 갈등을 피하기만 하면 말문이 막힐 수 있어요. 잘 안 풀리는 사람과의 거리를 한 칸 두세요.
ko.career: 일과 진로는 직감, 섬세함, 지적 흡수력을 매력, 미감, 조율 능력으로 증명할 때 열려요. 단순히 반복되는 일보다 본인 색깔과 결과가 잘 드러나는 일이 잘 맞아요. 주목받는 자리에 익숙해지면 의외로 잘 풀리는 면이 있어요. 기획, 콘텐츠, 기술, 교육, 돈 다루기, 디자인, 연구, 관리, 사람 이끄는 일 분야에서 강점이 드러나요. 상사 눈치만 보는 자리보다 책임을 맡아 판을 정리할 때 중요한 역할을 맡을 기회가 생겨요. 작은 성과도 수치와 사례로 남기면 새 기회, 제안, 같이 일할 사람이 늘어요. 같이 일하기할 때 당신이 마지막 정리를 맡으면 결과가 좋아요. 작은 결과도 기록해두면 나중에 진짜 자기 작품 모음이 돼요.
ko.wealth: 돈은 즉시 효과보다 지속되는 복으로 풀려요. 계묘은 감각이 좋아도 구조가 없으면 새는 돈이 생겨요. 당신이 모은 돈보다 누군가에게 빌려준 돈 회수가 의외로 큰 변수입니다. 용돈/지출, 가격, 약속, 모아두는 돈을 분명히 정리하는 게 좋아요. 매력, 미감, 조율 능력을 돈으로 바꾸는 능력이 있으니 정보, 기술, 취향, 신뢰가 결국 돈이 되는 편이에요. 한 가지를 깊게 하되 돈 들어오는 길은 두 개 이상으로 만들어두면 안정돼요. 돈에 관해 결정한 후 후회는 적은 편이지만 결정 전 망설임은 커요. 갑자기 사고 싶어지는 건 보통 자존심이 상할 때 와요 — 그때 조심하세요.
ko.love: 연애는 칭찬과 안정감이 관계를 단단하게 해요. 겉은 담담해도 속으로는 상대의 말투, 약속, 센스를 오래 봐요. 연애 초반에는 빠르게 빠지지만 진짜 마음을 보여주는 데까지는 시간이 더 걸립니다. 대화와 취향에서 끌림이 시작되고, 믿음이 쌓이면 현실적인 도움으로 마음을 보여줘요. 밀당보다 일관성이 더 큰 설렘을 만들고, 작은 약속이 애정의 증거가 돼요. 다만 서운함을 시험하듯 돌려 말하면 관계가 피곤해져요. 한 사람에게 빠지면 다른 사람이 안 보이는 면이 강해요. 필요한 말은 타이밍 맞춰 직접 하는 게 좋아요.
ko.health: 건강은 리듬 관리가 핵심이에요. 비와 안개 같은 비 작은 물의 기질에 봄처럼 자라는 기운이 더해져 과로하면 잠이 얕아지거나 속이 예민해지는 식으로 몸이 먼저 신호를 보낼 수 있어요. 몸이 보내는 신호를 무시하다가 한 번 크게 후회한 적이 있어요. 버티는 힘이 있어도 방전 뒤 회복은 느려요. 밤늦은 감정 소비와 카페인 의존은 줄이는 편이 좋고, 몸의 작은 경고를 초기에 잡는 게 좋아요. 한 번 아프면 회복까지 평균보다 오래 걸리는 편이에요. 규칙적인 식사, 수분, 스트레칭, 햇빛, 취침 시간을 지키면 운의 컨디션도 안정돼요.
ko.family: 가족 관계는 사랑과 경계의 균형이 핵심이에요. 직감, 섬세함, 지적 흡수력 때문에 집안에서 믿음직한 사람, 중재자, 조용한 해결사가 되기 쉬워요. 가족 중 한 명에게 표현하지 못한 감사가 한 번은 남아 있어요. 그러나 사랑이 자동으로 계속될 거라 생각하면 관계가 식어요. 어른과는 일관된 거리를 유지하고, 형제나 가까운 사람과는 함께 할 일과 각자의 영역을 구분하는 게 좋아요. 집안 문제를 혼자 떠안지 말아야 해요. 가족 안에서 당신 위치가 외부에서의 위치와 다릅니다. 전통은 힘이 되는 것만 남기는 편이 좋아요.
ko.fame: 평판은 흐릿한 색보다 또렷한 색을 보상한다. 계묘은 크게 외치기보다 직감, 섬세함, 지적 흡수력과 매력, 미감, 조율 능력이 반복될 때 이름이 남아요. 당신이 의식하지 않은 행동에서 가장 큰 인정이 와요. 콘텐츠든 직장이든 사람들은 결국 "진짜 그 사람답다"는 기준을 기억해요. 같이 일한 사람의 몫을 인정하면 평판이 오래 가요. 말이 날카로워지는 순간에는 이미지가 빨리 나빠질 수 있으니 사람들 앞에서 감정을 표현할 땐 한 번 더 다듬는 게 좋아요. 곧 당신 이름이 한 자리에서 의외로 나와요. 꾸준한 결과물이 결국 가장 큰 응원을 부르는 거예요.
